final:
// // This module finds the minimum of two 4-bit inputs instead of the maximum.
module top_module(
    input wire [3:0] priority_enc_out,
    input wire [3:0] comb_circuit_out,
    output reg [3:0] max_out
);// Comparator functional module
    always @(*) begin
        if (priority_enc_out > comb_circuit_out) begin
            max_out = priority_enc_out;
        end else begin
            max_out = comb_circuit_out;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module finds the minimum of two 4-bit inputs instead of the maximum.
